code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
for line in lines
  if not string.is_empty(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    if n <= 3
      print("#{line} -> short")
    else if n <= 7
      print("#{line} -> medium")
    else
      print("#{line} -> long")
    end
  end
end
